textByHashes.5f3d59c04a97d634576d6432b11b17726a026184: You're asking me how you should interrogate me?
textByHashes.c46121ff38a21742081bdf46217d428259b9425d: I know what a chicken is!
textByHashes.33595498b001f4f8c8829d621b1479b8ff7c2f39: I don't know what game you're playing, but it won't work on me!
textByHashes.db0e82360230292eca6d788b62928bad06d1d61e: Alright, enough! I'll tell you what you want!
textByHashes.2984321fcebeececf032223c6700d4df4f8cc5d9: I don't know their name. They just paid us to attack the delegation. They didn't look to be from around here. I reckon it was one of your lot!
textByHashes.24a5d715d002e6839290481bb81666b73f6299c5: They didn't say, but that priest... he was the target!
textByHashes.7da56a5ad042f819e6a97807a784fa93dbc8cc97: You are a crazy man. The only thing you will find out here in the desert is your death.
textByHashes.02ff381ac1fedf13907c2da45265bf8e88278537: Well, if memory serves me correctly, I think the hostilities began when they robbed one of our camels. A heinous crime.
textByHashes.ee24f6bc35784a81a7ce22d5e3f3546bad027e59: Those Menaphites would never do that. They have no sense of honour.
textByHashes.d888225c91297a79326bf1427b799560985dea1f: What's this? A mere promise of a camel? From a discount camel store? I knew those Menaphites were cowards. Tell them that we have changed our minds and demand 10 full-price camels in return for our
textByHashes.e913e6e15c8d47845d5c8362d6792555401b09fa: Good day adventurer. Have you come with the Menaphite peace offering?
textByHashes.30060dd7095c3637b88fce55992f37ad6d672baf: We can talk once you bring back the Menaphites' full peace offering.
textByHashes.5c20e9739524eab403ace3fff2418d7c85b117d6: Get out of here, you Menaphite dog!
textByHashes.bfcbb2e69881f7c9cefab5519e3680eeb516aaa7: It was brilliant the way you got rid of the Menaphite leader.
textByHashes.1e76c985008e10d5082f6f4c96104e6fe4cbec0a: So will you run the rest of them out of town now?
textByHashes.4bed215be4a931c30d02616fce829360573b275b: Welcome! Our leader wants to congratulate you on your swift disposal of the Menaphites who plagued this town.
textByHashes.7c66e61e57037b06ec9baf582a27155ca56d0f40: You dog! You killed our champion and for that you will die!
textByHashes.8c54918a97e6b8c932a7b25ac643885ecb2372dd: Get out of this village. You are not welcome here.
textByHashes.de1bc944eef97fe560a2e550c795f050ad7a3048: So you're the one who freed Azzanadra from his prison? Thank you!
textByHashes.a0d91f4c6fdd6c376c1210cdf46648b17f244405: You chose the wrong place to start trouble!
textByHashes.1720c46d98a0fc7607517840eeea86308582f1a0: I'm too busy for chitchat. Come back if you have some business to discuss with us.
